channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking startup
item.description: Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by Ben Affleck.

item.title: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
item.description: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.

item.title: Finally, some good news for budget-conscious laptop fans — Lenovo Legion R9000P is the world's first laptop with inkjet-printed OLED
item.description: Lenovo’s Legion R9000P introduces TCL CSOT’s inkjet OLED technology, bringing advanced display manufacturing and sharper visuals to gaming laptops.

item.title: This unpronounceable series of glyphs is an incredible side project from Kieran Hebden (aka Four Tet)
item.description: Just why? ʅ͡͡͡͡͡͡͡͡͡͡͡(̸̢̛̼̞̭͋ͅ)̸͚̰͛̔̾̀̿͒͂:̴͓̞̑̌̂̆̊͋̀:̸͎̟̯̂̓̌ ҉ ͡ ͞ ͞ ͞ ҉● ࿀ ● ࿀ ● ҉⃝ ⃝͢ ͞ ͘ ͞⃝̕ ͢ ̛ ⃝ ̸ ̡ ͢⃝̧ ͡ ͡ ̀ ̧ ̢⃝͜ ҉ ͞ ͞ ⃝͞ ͞ ͡⃝ ⃝҉҈҉҈҉҈҉҈҉҈҉ :̶̢͙͙͕̠̩͆(̷̮͍͚̫͚͂̍)̵̳̗̊( ̟̞̝̜̙̘̗̖҉̵̴̨̧̢̡̼̻̺̹̳̲̱̰̯̮̭̬̫̪̩̦̥ What am I supposed to do with this? It's un-Googleable. Unpronounceable. It doesn't even render the same way on various platforms. It looks one way on YouTube Music. Another on Apple Music. And yet another on Bandcamp. Even the artist name ⣎⡇ꉺლ༽இ•̛)ྀ◞ […]...

item.title: The internet reacts to the first-ever World Cup Halftime show
item.description: The internet reacts to the first-ever World Cup Halftime show
